roles.title: Select pool automation
roles.description: Enable different automations for your pool setup. The minimal setup is with Atlas Scientific setup with chlorine and acid pumps.

nodes.title: Configure pool nodes
nodes.description: Select your devices that are to be used for monitoring and automation

settings.title: Review pool settings
settings.description: Review and adjust integration settings before creating the pool entry. You can change these later in integration options.

data.winter_mode: Winter mode (pause all logic and notifications)
data.max_ppm_increase_per_dose: Max free chlorine increase per dose (ppm)

data_description.winter_mode: Master override: pauses all dosing, pump controls, and automations, including notifications, while still reading sensor values
data_description.max_chlorine_dose_ml: Hard upper limit for a single chlorine dose regardless of chemistry caps
data_description.max_acid_dose_ml: Hard upper limit for a single acid dose regardless of chemistry caps
data_description.chlorine_cooldown_seconds: Minimum time that must pass before chlorine can be dosed again
data_description.acid_cooldown_seconds: Minimum time that must pass before acid can be dosed again
data_description.orp_hysteresis_mv: Dose is triggered when ORP drops below target minus this value
data_description.level_hysteresis_percent: Fill starts when level is below target minus this value
data_description.max_fill_runtime_minutes: Safety timeout: fill valve is force-closed when exceeded
data_description.chlorine_strength_percent: Available chlorine concentration of your product, used to compute the pool-size dose cap
data_description.max_ppm_increase_per_dose: Maximum allowed rise in free chlorine from a single dose
data_description.acid_strength_percent: Concentration of your acid product, used to compute the pool-size dose cap
data_description.max_ph_drop_per_dose: Maximum allowed pH decrease from a single dose
data_description.notify_service: Full HA service name, e.g. notify.mobile_app_myphone. Leave empty to use only the persistent notification panel
data_description.notification_cooldown_minutes: Prevents repeated notifications for the same active condition

error.no_esphome_nodes: No ESPHome nodes were found in Home Assistant. Add your ESPHome devices first.
error.nodes_must_be_unique: Each role must point to a unique ESPHome node
error.node_not_found: One or more selected node names were not found in the ESPHome integration

abort.already_configured: This pool integration is already configured
